Name: Daniel Baseline
Noted Behavior: Baseline with proper warmup (10k learning starts). Should show clear learning progression from -21 toward -15.

Name: Very Fast LR
Noted Behavior: 10x higher learning rate - likely to diverge or become unstable. Q-values may explode.

Name: Moderate Fast LR
Noted Behavior: 2.5x baseline LR - should learn faster while remaining stable. Good candidate for best config.

Name: Extreme Short Horizon
Noted Behavior: gamma=0.85 - very short-sighted. Should perform poorly as agent cannot plan rallies longer than ~10 steps.

Name: Very Long Horizon
Noted Behavior: gamma near 1.0 - values future rewards heavily. Should perform well but may need more steps to converge.

Name: Extra Large Batch
Noted Behavior: Very large batch - very stable gradients but slower learning per step. Should show smooth reward curve.

Name: Very Fast Epsilon Decay
Noted Behavior: Epsilon decays in first 2% of training (10k steps). Agent becomes greedy too early - may plateau at poor policy.

Name: Very Slow Epsilon Decay
Noted Behavior: Epsilon decays over 50% of training (250k steps). Explores too long - delayed learning but potentially better final policy.

Name: Large Buffer + Early Learning
Noted Behavior: Large buffer (200k) with early learning start (5k). More diverse replay experiences - should learn faster.

Name: Daniel Best Combined
column15: balanced epsilon decay (12%). Expected best performance.
